title: wedelia jacquinii var. cruciana
intro: Wedelia jacquinii var. cruciana, also known as Wedelia or Flor de Muerto, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, native to Mexico and Central America. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's medicinal properties provide numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Wedelia jacquinii var. cruciana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional and modern medicine.
